title: Arcana Mutating Rite Profiles
description: Authoritative contract for write-capable rites: whether they plan, apply, append, or only write through an explicit operation.

profiles.idempotency: Refuses to overwrite an existing manifest; rerun returns a validation failure without changing the file.
profiles.validation_profile: python rites/sync_library.py --home <home>; python rites/validate_grimoire_structure.py --grimoire <target> after the grimoire has a full scaffold.

profiles.idempotency: Append-only by design; invocation workflows gate one append per completed operation.
profiles.validation_profile: Inspect the appended log entry; run relevant grimoire validators for the operation that produced the entry.

profiles.idempotency: Removes and recreates build outputs for the requested version.
profiles.validation_profile: Run the release build check and inspect produced archives and checksums before publishing.

profiles.idempotency: After cleanup, rerun reports nothing to clean.

writes: supported agent instruction files under the user's home directory
profiles.idempotency: After apply, rerun reports every target present: an absent file is created with the canonical block, a block-less file gets one inserted, a single clean marked region is refreshed in place, and a block already matching the template is left unchanged. Files with duplicate or malformed markers are left untouched and reported for the agentfile judgment edit.
Refuses to overwrite an existing page; rerun returns a refusal without changing the file.

writes: supported agent skill directories under the user's home directory
profiles.idempotency: Rerunning with the same inputs produces the same rendered skill files; stale cleanup removes only skill directories with Arcana ownership metadata or generated provenance. With --reset-managed, current managed namespace directories are replaced before re-registration.
profiles.validation_profile: python rites/sync_skills.py --dry-run; temp-target pytest coverage for dry-run, repeated apply, generated-provenance update, owned cleanup, unowned preservation, managed-namespace reset, and prefix collisions.

writes: active-grimoire Markdown files with unambiguous wikilink repairs
profiles.idempotency: After apply, rerun reports no repairs for links it already normalized.
Install/update behavior is governed by the Summoning Rite contract and mode-specific prompts.
profiles.validation_profile: Summoning Rite parity checks and release smoke tests.

profiles.idempotency: Install/update behavior is governed by the Summoning Rite contract and mode-specific prompts.
Install/update behavior is governed by the Summoning Rite contract and mode-specific prompts.
After apply, rerun reports docs/skills.md is up to date.

Writes under compare-and-swap: re-reads and rebuilds if library.json changed since it was read, so a concurrent sync or adopt is never clobbered; a persistent conflict fails loudly. After apply, rerun reports the library is in sync unless disk state changed.
profiles.validation_profile: python rites/sync_library.py; python rites/sync_skills.py --dry-run after approved library changes.

writes: grimoire working trees (fast-forward-only pulls) and Arcana-owned managed scaffold during heal
profiles.idempotency: Pulls are fast-forward-only and heals are idempotent: a second run on a current, clean library pulls nothing and heals nothing new. Grimoires that are dirty, diverged, or unreachable are reported and left untouched.
profiles.validation_profile: python rites/summon.py --update; python rites/validate.py --grimoire <path> --summary after apply.

writes: transient validator reports under rites/.artifacts when parallel mode is used
profiles.idempotency: Validation does not change durable Arcana or grimoire content; transient reports may be refreshed.
